Upgrade to Creator Max?

Takes effect immediately. You'll be charged a prorated amount today, then $20/month going forward. Unlocks custom themes, hero links, and full branding control.

Downgrade to Pro?

Takes effect immediately with prorated credit for your unused Creator Max time. Your custom theme and hero links will remain saved but won't display until you upgrade again.

Are you sure? You'll keep your plan until the end of your billing period.

Your data stays saved — if you ever come back, everything will be right where you left it.

Reactivate your Pro plan? Your subscription will continue as normal.

How to calculate engagement rate
The industry-standard formula:
(Avg. likes + comments per post) ÷ Followers × 100
Quick method: Take your last 10 posts. Add up all likes + comments. Divide by 10 (your average). Divide that by your follower count. Multiply by 100.
What's a good rate?
• 1-3%. Typical for accounts with 100K+ followers
• 3-6%. Strong engagement
• 6%+. Exceptional engagement
Report your primary platform's rate (usually Instagram). Brands care most about this number.

Sign PDF

Fill out and sign any PDF. No printing, no scanning. Everything happens in your browser, your file never touches a server.

Drop a PDF here
Or click to browse · 10MB max
How it works
  1. Upload your PDF, it stays in your browser, nothing is uploaded to our servers
  2. Drop fields (signature, text, date, checkbox) onto the pages
  3. Click a field to fill it in or draw your signature
  4. Download or print the finished PDF

Upgrade to Creator Max?

Your current Pro plan will be upgraded immediately. Stripe will charge a prorated amount for the difference and your billing date stays the same.

Creator Max is $20/month.

📋 Step-by-step guide

How to Download Your Instagram Data

Follow these steps to get your Instagram data export. Upload the ZIP file directly to Ryxa — no unzipping needed.

1
Open Instagram Settings
  • Open Instagram on your phone
  • Go to your profile tab
  • Tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top right
  • Tap Accounts Center
2
Request Your Data Export
  • Tap Your information and permissions
  • Tap Export your information
  • Tap Create export
  • Select your Instagram account
  • Tap Export to device
3
Select Followers and Following Only
  • Tap Customize information
  • Clear all sections except Followers and following
  • Tap Save
4
Set Export Settings

Make sure both of these are set correctly before continuing:

✓
Date rangeSet to All time
✓
FormatSet to JSON (not HTML)
5
Submit and Wait for the Email
  • Tap Create files or Start export
  • Instagram will email you a download link when ready
  • This usually takes a few minutes but can take up to 48 hours
6
Download the ZIP and Upload It
  • Open the email from Instagram and click the Download button
  • Save the ZIP file to your device — do not extract it
  • Come back to Follow-Back Audit and upload the ZIP directly
  • We’ll find the right files automatically and run your analysis
💡The ZIP is named something like instagram-username-2026-04-01.zip. Upload it exactly as downloaded — no unzipping needed.
✓ Large accounts are fully supported

If you have a large follower list, Instagram splits your data across multiple files inside the ZIP. Ryxa finds and processes all of them automatically.
